name: Seared Pineapple Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the pineapple into slices no more than 1/4 inch thick.
2. Cut each slice in half.
3. Dry saute the pineapple slices in a skillet for 8 minutes or so until they are caramelized and golden brown. Be careful not to use too high heat.
4. When cooked, dice the pineapple and transfer it to a mixing bowl.
5. Stir in the remaining ingredients (orange juice, lime juice, cilantro, and brown sugar). Taste and adjust by adding more lime juice or chipotle chile puree as needed.
This salsa rates a cool 4 out of 10. As a variation, replace the pineapple with peaches and cook using the same directions.
